_schema_notes: Rules MAY include an optional 'feature_id' field when the rule was added for a specific groomed feature.
feature_id links back to features/<feature_id>/ — the living requirements document for that feature.
Rules without feature_id are baseline regression/ACL expectations.
When a QA audit finds a violation on a rule with feature_id, Dev must IMPLEMENT the feature (not just fix a regression).

roles.notes: Content editor role — access admin pages but not site configuration

rules.notes: Destructive or side-effect routes — skip entirely. GET requests here may trigger state changes or require test data that doesn't exist. Assume ACL mirrors non-destructive routes on the same resource. First-match so no other rule fires.

ai_conversation chat pages are per-owner — each user gets their own conversation created on entry. Crawl may visit /node/{id}/chat belonging to a different role's session, causing false 403s. Ignore direct node/chat URLs; the entry route /talk-with-forseti_content is tested via the talk-with-forseti-content rule.
Devel module routes — skip entirely. Not relevant to production ACL and may have side effects (menu rebuild, cache flush, etc.).
GenAiDebugController routes require 'administer site configuration' — admin-only. content_editor lacks this permission. Listed before admin-area so first-match denies content_editor correctly.
All copilot-agent-tracker dashboard routes require 'administer copilot agent tracker'. content_editor lacks this permission. Listed before admin-area so content_editor gets correct deny.
waitingonkeith routes require 'administer copilot agent tracker'. Listed before admin-area.
Added for feature forseti-community-incident-report. Moderation dashboard for pending/published reports must be admin-only; listed before admin-area so content_editor is denied.
Added for feature forseti-community-incident-report. Community report form is authenticated-only and uses Drupal Form API CSRF protection on submit.
Added for feature forseti-community-incident-report. Public listing page for published community incidents.

Entity-ID or parameterized routes that require uploaded resume, job application data, or specific company IDs the QA test user does not have. 404 with placeholder/missing data is expected — ignore rather than flag as violations.
Google Jobs API routes — require API key not present in dev environment; 500/400 in dev is expected

PM decision 2026-02-27 (pm-forseti): BrowserAutomationService Phase 2 credentials screen is per-user (not admin-only). Authenticated users manage their own ATS platform credentials here. Must match BEFORE jobhunter-admin (which would deny authenticated via 'settings' path). 500 error in local dev is a separate code bug — delegate to dev-forseti.

Admin-only jobhunter routes requiring 'administer job application automation' — authenticated users only have 'access job hunter' and should be denied. Listed before jobhunter-surface for first-match-wins. Note: credentials-ui rule listed before this one to allow authenticated access to /jobhunter/settings/credentials.

Short-form application-submission routes (no /jobhunter/ prefix) — require 'access job hunter'. Authenticated users can access; anon denied. Not covered by jobhunter-surface which only matches /jobhunter/ prefix.

Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-profile (TC-01, TC-02, TC-15, TC-16, TC-18). Covers /jobhunter/profile, /jobhunter/profile/edit, /jobhunter/profile/dashboard, /jobhunter/profile/summary, /jobhunter/my-profile, /jobhunter/my-profile/edit. Authenticated=allow (200 at final URL after redirect); anon=deny. Administrator=allow per TC-16 (admin may access profile routes). Must be listed before jobhunter-surface for feature_id linkage.

Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-profile (TC-08). Ownership-level check: owning user=allow, other authenticated=deny (cross-user denial verified via E2E TC-11, not role-audit). anon=deny. Role-audit only validates anon denial; cross-user ownership is E2E-only.

Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-profile (TC-09). Ownership-level check: owning user=allow, other authenticated=deny (cross-user denial verified via E2E). anon=deny. Role-audit only validates anon denial.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-interview-scheduler. My Jobs badges and interview-round save route are authenticated-only JobHunter surfaces; anon denied, job-seeker authenticated allowed.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-salary-tracker. Salary expectation save route is authenticated-only and CSRF-protected; anon denied, job-seeker authenticated allowed.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-rejection-analysis. Close/reject route is authenticated-only and CSRF-protected; anon denied, job-seeker authenticated allowed.

User-facing jobhunter routes (access job hunter permission). content_editor/administrator are not job seekers — ignore. jobhunter-admin and jobhunter-api-dev rules take priority (listed first) for admin/API sub-paths.

SUPPRESSED 2026-02-27 (pm-forseti): administrator and content_editor violations are QA session auth failures, not product defects. Dev-forseti confirmed: is_admin:true bypasses all perms, content_editor has 'use ai conversation' in config/sync. QA crawl runs as anonymous due to expired/failed session cookies (evidence: admin crawl also 403s on /node/add). Fix owner: qa-forseti (add session-validity probe to scripts/site-audit-run.sh). Restore to 'allow' when qa-forseti confirms session auth fixed.
CEO decision 2026-02-27: /talk-with-forseti is the short URL alias for the AI Conversation feature. Auth required — anon=deny is correct and expected.

CEO decision 2026-02-27: Registration is admin_only (drush config:get user.settings register = admin_only). Anon 403 is correct. content_editor and administrator 403s in local dev crawl are QA session auth failures (same pattern as talk-with-forseti-content — crawl runs as anonymous when session cookies expire). Suppressed to 'ignore' for content_editor pending qa-forseti session-validity fix.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-application-submission (TC-04/TC-05). Authenticated users with 'access job hunter' permission: allow. Anonymous: deny.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-application-submission (TC-04/TC-05). Covers /jobhunter/application-submission/{job_id} and sub-paths.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-application-submission (TC-04/TC-05). Short-URL alias for /jobhunter/application-submission.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-application-submission (TC-04/TC-05). Short-URL alias covering /application-submission/{job_id} and sub-paths.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-application-status-dashboard (TC-1). GET /jobhunter/my-jobs requires authentication. Anonymous access must return 403.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-application-status-dashboard (TC-9). POST /jobhunter/my-jobs/bulk-archive requires authentication + valid CSRF token. Anon or no-CSRF must return 403.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-google-jobs-ux (TC-1). GET /jobhunter/googlejobssearch requires 'access job hunter' permission. Anonymous access must return 403.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-google-jobs-ux (TC-8). Job detail requires 'administer job application automation' — admin-only. Anon and regular authenticated users denied.

Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-resume-tailoring-display (TC-1). GET /jobhunter/jobtailoring/{job_id} requires 'access job hunter' permission. Anonymous access must return 403. Non-integer job_id returns 404 (routing.yml job_id:\d+ constraint). Cross-user access must return 403/404 (controller must verify job.uid == current_user->id()).

Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-resume-tailoring-display (TC-6/TC-7). POST-only job_hunter.job_tailoring_save_resume route requires CSRF token. Missing/invalid CSRF must return 403. Anon access must return 403. STAGE 0 PENDING: route not yet added by Dev.
Dedicated AI chat page for authenticated users. Requires 'use ai conversation' permission. Anonymous access → 403. Added for feature forseti-ai-conversation-user-chat (release-f).
CSRF-protected POST endpoint. GET returns 405/403; POST without CSRF returns 403. Skip GET probes — this is a POST-only route with CSRF. Added for feature forseti-ai-conversation-user-chat.

Cover letter display page for authenticated users. Requires 'access job hunter' permission and uid ownership check. Anonymous access -> 403. Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-cover-letter-display (release-g).
CSRF-protected POST endpoint to trigger cover letter generation. POST-only with _csrf_token: TRUE (split-route pattern). GET returns 405/403. Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-cover-letter-display.
CSRF-protected POST endpoint to save cover letter to application. POST-only with _csrf_token: TRUE. GET returns 405/403. Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-cover-letter-display.
Interview prep page for authenticated users. Requires 'access job hunter' permission and uid ownership check. Anonymous access -> 403. Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-interview-prep (release-g).
CSRF-protected POST endpoint to save interview prep notes. POST-only with _csrf_token: TRUE (split-route pattern). GET returns 405/403. Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-interview-prep.
CSRF-protected AJAX POST endpoint for AI interview tips. POST-only with _csrf_token: TRUE. Returns JSON. GET returns 405/403. Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-interview-prep.
Google Jobs search page with saved searches panel. Requires 'access job hunter'. Anonymous access -> 403. Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-saved-search (release-g).
CSRF-protected POST endpoint to save a search. POST-only with _csrf_token: TRUE (split-route pattern). GET returns 405/403. Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-saved-search.
CSRF-protected POST endpoint to delete a saved search. POST-only with _csrf_token: TRUE. GET returns 405/403. Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-saved-search.
Export route (GET). Added for feature forseti-ai-conversation-export.
Non-integer conversation_id blocked by routing constraint. Added for feature forseti-ai-conversation-export.
GET /forseti/conversations — requires 'use ai conversation' permission + logged in
POST /forseti/conversations/{id}/delete — POST-only, CSRF-guarded, integer constraint
Agent tracker admin dashboard and agent-detail sub-pages. Requires 'administer copilot agent tracker' permission.
Telemetry POST endpoint. Token-auth via X-Copilot-Agent-Tracker-Token header. No Drupal CSRF (token-auth channel). GET not supported.

POST wizard step routes — CSRF-guarded (_csrf_token: TRUE) + 'access job hunter' permission. Anon POST → 403 (no auth, CSRF check does not reach permission check). Tagged for forseti-qa-suite-fill-jobhunter-submission suite activation.
my-jobs dashboard requires access job hunter permission
bulk archive POST requires auth + CSRF
archive view requires access job hunter permission
google jobs search requires access job hunter permission
google jobs detail requires access job hunter; non-integer job_id returns 404
job tailoring GET requires access job hunter; non-integer job_id returns 404
save resume POST requires auth + CSRF (_csrf_token: TRUE confirmed present)
forseti chat requires use ai conversation permission
send message POST requires auth + CSRF (_csrf_token: TRUE confirmed)
Telemetry POST endpoint. Requires valid X-Telemetry-Token header (state-based auth). Anon/missing-token returns 403. Oversized payload (>64 KB) returns 413 after this feature ships.
Payload > 65536 bytes must return 413 for all callers (size check runs before auth check per AC). Verification: POST 65537+ bytes to this endpoint.
CompanyController delete confirm route. return_to param must reject //evil.com (protocol-relative) and http://evil.com (absolute). Valid /path accepted. Fallback: /jobhunter/my-jobs.
cover_letter_generate route. _csrf_token: TRUE — requires ?token= in URL query. Dead form_token POST body field removed. POST without ?token= must return 403.
interview_prep_save route. _csrf_token: TRUE — URL query token only. Dead form_token POST body field removed.
saved_search_save route. _csrf_token: TRUE — URL query token only. Dead form_token POST body field removed from google-jobs-search.html.twig (pending dev BLOCK fix).
saved_search_delete route. _csrf_token: TRUE — URL query token only. Dead form_token POST body field removed from google-jobs-search.html.twig (pending dev BLOCK fix).
job_tailoring_save_resume route. _csrf_token: TRUE — URL query token only. Dead name="token" POST body field removed from job-tailoring-combined.html.twig (pending dev BLOCK fix).

AJAX POST endpoint to save/update application notes. _csrf_token: TRUE — URL ?token= required. anon → 403. Ownership guard (job_id must map to a saved_job owned by uid) → 403 for mismatched user. Path corrected 2026-04-11 (Dev used /jobhunter/jobs/ prefix not /jobhunter/application-notes).
GET endpoint to retrieve existing notes for a saved job (pre-populate AJAX). anon → 403. Returns notes for authenticated user only. Path corrected 2026-04-11.

AJAX POST endpoint to submit/update thumbs-up or thumbs-down feedback for a tailored resume. _csrf_token: TRUE — URL ?token= required. anon → 403. Ownership guard (tailored_resume_id must belong to authenticated uid) → 403 for mismatched user.

AI chat AJAX endpoint. _user_is_logged_in: TRUE + _csrf_token: TRUE required. Anon -> 403. When message contains job-suggestion trigger phrase, response includes job_suggestions array (up to 3 entries scoped to current user uid). No new route — extends existing ai_conversation.api_chat.

CSRF-protected POST endpoint for AI chat. _csrf_token: TRUE and _user_is_logged_in: TRUE. Anon -> 403. Auth POST without ?token= -> 403. Added for feature forseti-ai-conversation-job-suggestions (job suggestions extension to ChatController).
New Application Status Dashboard route (dev to implement). Requires 'access job hunter' permission. Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-bulk-status-update.

New bulk update POST endpoint. _csrf_token: TRUE, _user_is_logged_in: TRUE. Anon POST without token → 403. Auth POST with valid token + owned job_ids + valid status → 200. Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-bulk-status-update.

New build subsection route (dev to implement). Permission: administer copilot agent tracker. AC-6 references 'access copilot agent tracker' — discrepancy flagged; live routing uses 'administer copilot agent tracker'.
New build subsection route (dev to implement). Permission: administer copilot agent tracker. Added for feature forseti-langgraph-console-build-sections.
New build subsection route (dev to implement). Permission: administer copilot agent tracker. Added for feature forseti-langgraph-console-build-sections.
New build subsection route (dev to implement). Permission: administer copilot agent tracker. Added for feature forseti-langgraph-console-build-sections.
Added for feature forseti-langgraph-console-test-sections. AC-6 says 'access copilot agent tracker' but routing.yml uses 'administer copilot agent tracker'.
Added for feature forseti-langgraph-console-test-sections.
Added for feature forseti-langgraph-console-test-sections.
Added for feature forseti-langgraph-console-test-sections.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-application-deadline-tracker. AC-1: date form shown on job page.
Added for forseti-jobhunter-application-deadline-tracker. POST-only route for date save. CSRF required. Split-route pattern.
Added for forseti-jobhunter-application-deadline-tracker. AC-4: deadlines dashboard.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-company-interest-tracker. POST save endpoint for company interest. Auth required; CSRF required.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-company-interest-tracker. Per-user watchlist page. Auth required.
Added for feature forseti-langgraph-console-release-panel. Admin-only route. Permission: administer copilot agent tracker.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-company-research-tracker. Per-user company research list. Auth required.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-company-research-tracker. POST save endpoint for company research overlay. Auth + CSRF required.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-contact-tracker. Per-user contact list. Auth required.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-contact-tracker. Contact create/edit/delete endpoints. Auth + CSRF required on POST.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-job-board-preferences. Per-user job-board source preferences page. Auth required; CSRF required on POST.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-job-board-preferences. Per-user job board source preferences page. Auth required; CSRF required on POST.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-resume-version-labeling. Resume list page with version labels. Auth required.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-resume-version-labeling. Resume edit form — version_label + version_notes fields. Auth + CSRF required on POST.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-contact-referral-tracker. Per-user contact list view. Auth required.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-contact-referral-tracker. Contact add/edit form (GET). Auth required.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-contact-referral-tracker. Link contact to saved job (POST, CSRF required). Auth required.
Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-resume-version-tracker. POST route to link a resume to an application (CSRF required). Auth required.
Analytics dashboard — requires authentication. Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-application-analytics.
Job list with overdue follow-up badges — requires authentication. Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-follow-up-reminders.
CSRF-protected AJAX POST to save follow-up date. GET not expected; POST requires valid CSRF token. Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-follow-up-reminders.
Saved-job list and detail — requires authentication; interview round form lives here. Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-interview-outcome-tracker.
CSRF-protected AJAX POST to save/update interview round. Anon should be 403; authenticated POST with valid token only. Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-interview-outcome-tracker.
Offer comparison page — requires authentication. Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-offer-tracker.
CSRF-protected AJAX POST to save/update offer details. Anon should be 403; authenticated POST with valid CSRF token only. Added for feature forseti-jobhunter-offer-tracker.
AI provider admin config page — admin-only. Added for feature forseti-ai-local-llm-provider-selection.
Chat route must remain accessible to authenticated users after provider selection feature; anon blocked. Added for feature forseti-ai-local-llm-provider-selection.
LangGraph console Run panel — admin-only. Anon and non-admin authenticated should be blocked. Added for feature forseti-langgraph-console-run-session.
